capabilities.justification: The native extension starts a local TCP listener for Mini Redis integration tests and embedded use.
The Rust embeddable TCP runtime launches the Ruby stdio worker process that owns Mini Redis protocol state.
The Ruby worker consumes JSON-line command jobs from the Rust TCP bridge.
The Ruby worker returns JSON-line command results to the Rust TCP bridge.

justification: The package embeds the Rust TCP server runtime as a Ruby native extension and runs a Ruby Mini Redis worker behind it.
